# One letter-combo per line for arduino:avr:micro (ProMicro) builds.
# "-" means the base build with no optional letters.
# See brWheel_my/docs for what each letter enables.
# Lines here MUST fit in the ATmega32U4's 32KB flash - CI verifies this on every push.
-
abx
acdwhx
achexn
achx
achxn
acx
ahxnl
ax
azhxn
bcdwuxg
bcdwux
bcdwxg
bcdwx
bdwuxg
bdwux
bdxg
bxg
bx
cdwhx
chfxn
chfxnr
chtx
cx
dkx
dwfx
dwxn
dx
fx
htx
hxl
hxng
hxnl
hxnr
ix
kx
sx
x
xg
xl
xnr
zfx
zhtx
zhxn
zhxnl
zx
